type BatchNodeAgentInfo = class interface IJsonModel<BatchNodeAgentInfo> interface IPersistableModel<BatchNodeAgentInfo>

Docs.summary: The Batch Compute Node agent is a program that runs on each Compute Node in the Pool and provides Batch capability on the Compute Node.

MemberSignature.Value: public DateTimeOffset LastUpdateTime { get; }
.property instance valuetype System.DateTimeOffset LastUpdateTime
Public ReadOnly Property LastUpdateTime As DateTimeOffset
member this.LastUpdateTime : DateTimeOffset

Docs.summary: The time when the Compute Node agent was updated on the Compute Node. This is the most recent time that the Compute Node agent was updated to a new version.

MemberSignature.Value: public string Version { get; }
.property instance string Version
Public ReadOnly Property Version As String
member this.Version : string

Docs.summary: The version of the Batch Compute Node agent running on the Compute Node. This version number can be checked against the Compute Node agent release notes located at https://github.com/Azure/Batch/blob/master/changelogs/nodeagent/CHANGELOG.md.
